---
title: "Projet tutoré"
subtitle: "Espérance de vie & Age limite"
author: 
- Stave Icnel Dany OSIAS


date: 2026-04-14
lang: fr

format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: flatly
    number-sections: false
    code-line-numbers: true
    highlight-style: tango
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: false
    code-summary: "Voir le code"
    code-tools: true
    include-other-formats: false

execute:
  echo: true

# localized captions
figureTitle: "Fig."
tableTitle: "Tableau"
listingTitle: "Listing"
lofTitle: "Liste de Figures"
lotTitle: "Liste de tableaux"
tocTitle: "Table des matières"
lolTitle: "Listings"

polyglossia-lang:
  name: french
---

<style>
.callout-tip .callout-icon::before {
  display: none !important;
}
table {
  border-collapse: collapse;
  width: 100%;
  font-size: 14px;
}
thead tr {
  background-color: #18bc9c;
  color: white;
}
}
th, td {
  padding: 10px 14px;
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
}
</style>


::: {.unnumbered}
\clearpage
:::

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```


```{r}
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(extRemes)

JOURS_PAR_ANNEE <- 365.25

# Fonctions utilitaires
stability_plot_gpd <- function(x, seuils) {
  
  resultats <- lapply(seuils, function(u) {
    exc <- x[x > u]
    if (length(exc) < 30) return(c(xi = NA, sigma_adj = NA, n = length(exc)))
    
    fit <- tryCatch({
      extRemes::fevd(x, threshold = u, type = "GP", method = "Lmoments")
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    
    if (is.null(fit)) return(c(xi = NA, sigma_adj = NA, n = length(exc)))
    
    xi        <- unname(fit$results["shape"])
    sigma     <- unname(fit$results["scale"])
    sigma_adj <- sigma - xi * u
    
    c(xi = xi, sigma_adj = sigma_adj, n = length(exc))
  })
  
  xi_vals        <- sapply(resultats, `[[`, "xi")
  sigma_adj_vals <- sapply(resultats, `[[`, "sigma_adj")
  n_vals         <- sapply(resultats, `[[`, "n")
  valide         <- is.finite(xi_vals)
  
  
  par(mfrow = c(2, 1), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))
  
    
  plot(seuils[valide], sigma_adj_vals[valide], type = "l", col = "darkorange", lwd = 1.5,
       xlab = "",
       ylab = bquote("Echelle " ~ hat(sigma)*"*"),
       main = "")
  abline(h = mean(sigma_adj_vals[valide], na.rm = TRUE), lty = 2, col = "gray")

  axis(side = 3, at = seuils[valide],
       labels = round(n_vals[valide]),
       cex.axis = 0.5, col.axis = "blue", tick = FALSE)
  mtext("Nombre d'excès", side = 3, line = 2, col = "blue", cex = 0.8)
  
  plot(seuils[valide], xi_vals[valide], type = "l", col = "darkred", lwd = 1.5,
       xlab = "Seuil u (jours)",
       ylab = bquote("Forme " ~ hat(xi)),
       main = "")
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2, col = "gray")
  
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
  
  invisible(data.frame(
    seuil     = seuils[valide],
    xi        = xi_vals[valide],
    sigma_adj = sigma_adj_vals[valide],
    n_exc     = n_vals[valide]
  ))
}


gpd_endpoint_estimate <- function(x, u) {
  
  # Ajustement sur les données
  fit <- tryCatch({
    extRemes::fevd(x, threshold = u, type = "GP", method = "Lmoments")
  }, error = function(e) stop("Echec de l'ajustement GPD sur les données originales."))
  
  xi    <- unname(fit$results["shape"])
  sigma <- unname(fit$results["scale"])
  
  if (xi >= 0) stop("xi >= 0 : pas de borne supérieure finie.")
  
  x_star_gpd <- u - sigma / xi
  
  tableau <- data.frame(
    Parametre = c(
      "Seuil u",
      "xi (forme)",
      "sigma (échelle)",
      "x* (âge limite)"
    ),
    Jours = c(
      sprintf("%.0f j", u),
      sprintf("%.4f", xi),
      sprintf("%.2f j", sigma),
      sprintf("%.1f j", x_star_gpd)
    ),
    Annees = c(
      sprintf("%.2f ans", u / JOURS_PAR_ANNEE),
      "—",
      "—",
      sprintf("%.2f ans", x_star_gpd / JOURS_PAR_ANNEE)
    )
  )
  
  tbl <- kable(tableau,
               col.names = c("Paramètre", "Jours", "Années"),
               align     = c("l", "r", "r"),
               caption   = "Résultats POT + GPD (L-moments)") %>%
         kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                       full_width = FALSE,
                       position   = "left")
  
  # Retourne les deux : le tableau ET les valeurs numériques
  list(
    table  = tbl,         
    u      = u,
    xi     = xi,
    sigma  = sigma,
    x_star = x_star_gpd
  )
}

```



```{r}
library(readxl)
data_sup <-read_excel("C:/Users/ASUS/Downloads/R/Project/Supercentenarians/supercentenaires.xlsx")
age_JC <- max(data_sup$AGEDAYS)

boxplot(data_sup$AGEDAYS)
```

# Supercentenaires de la France

```{r}
data_France_105 <- data_sup$AGEDAYS[data_sup$COUNTRY == "FRA"]
length(data_France_105)
```


```{r}
mrlplot(data_France_105)
threshrange.plot(data_France_105, nint=20, type="GP", r=c(39000, 41000))

seuils <- seq(39000, 41000, by = 30)

res <- stability_plot_gpd(data_France_105, seuils)
```


```{r}
seuil_France_105=39420

gpd_mom_France_105= fevd(data_France_105, threshold = seuil_France_105,type = "GP",method = "Lmoments")

summary(gpd_mom_France_105)
```


```{r}
plot(gpd_mom_France_105)
```


```{r}
# Age limite avec la méthode des moments
res_France_105 <- gpd_endpoint_estimate(x=data_France_105, u=seuil_France_105)

res_France_105$table
```



# Supercentenaires à partir de 105 ans en France (sans JEANNE CALMENT) 

```{r}
data_France_105_sjc <- data_sup$AGEDAYS[data_sup$COUNTRY == "FRA" & data_sup$AGEYEARS < age_JC]
```

```{r}
mrlplot(data_France_105_sjc)

seuils <- seq(38500,41000, by = 30)

res <- stability_plot_gpd(data_France_105_sjc, seuils)
```


```{r}
seuil_France_105_sjc=39100

gpd_mom_France_105_sjc= fevd(data_France_105_sjc, threshold = seuil_France_105_sjc,type = "GP",method = "Lmoments")

summary(gpd_mom_France_105_sjc)
```

```{r}
plot(gpd_mom_France_105_sjc)
```


```{r}
# Age limite avec la méthode des moments
res_France_105_sjc <- gpd_endpoint_estimate(x=data_France_105_sjc, u=seuil_France_105_sjc)

res_France_105_sjc$table
```



```{r}
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)


# Tableau récapitulatif
tableau <- data.frame(
  Données = c(
    "France 105",
    "France 105 sans Jeanne Calment"
  ),
  
  Seuil_jours = c(
    seuil_France_105,
    seuil_France_105_sjc
  ),
  
  Seuil_annees = round(c(
    seuil_France_105,
    seuil_France_105_sjc
    )/ 365, 2),
  
  Nb_exces = c(
    length(data_France_105[data_France_105 > seuil_France_105]),
    length(data_France_105[data_France_105 > seuil_France_105_sjc])
  ),
  
  Âge_limite_ans = round(c(
    res_France_105$x_star,             # France 105
    res_France_105_sjc$x_star          # France 105 sans JC
  )/ 365.25, 2)
)


kable(tableau,
      col.names = c("Données", "Seuil (jours)", "Seuil (ans)", "Nb. d'excès", "Âge limite (ans)"),
      caption = "Tableau récapitulatif des estimations par GPD et L-moments de l'âge limite par jeu de données",
      align = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c"),
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE,
                latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  collapse_rows(columns = c(1, 3, 4), valign = "middle")
```
